name: newton-policy-packs
description: Monorepo for Newton Protocol policy packs. Each pack lives in its own top-level directory (AVS-side artifacts: Rego + WASM + schemas). TypeScript bindings are published per-pack as @newton-xyz/policy-pack-<name> from the packages/ workspace tree.

scripts.lint: find packages/*/src scripts -name '*.ts' -type f -print0 | xargs -0 biome check --reporter=summary
scripts.lint:fix: find packages/*/src scripts -name '*.ts' -type f -print0 | xargs -0 biome check --write --reporter=summary
